title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises - Apply Now

jsonLd.title: Manufacturing Engineer - Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises - Apply Now
jsonLd.description:
We at Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises are looking for an experienced Manufacturing Engineer based out of Noida. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises:
Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved International Enterprises!
